text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
"I was out with my friend, so I was a little late
getting home. That's all!"

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
In that case, you should have said what time you
were going to get home. You shouldn't make
Mom worry!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: "I wasn't even that late... Ugh, whatever!"

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I really should have kept my cool there...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What good is it if even I get worked up... Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ashamed of her blunder, Ines Fujin falls into a
funk.
